title: The Right Way To Build AI Agents — With NVIDIA's Adel El Hallak and ServiceNow's Joe Davis
summary: An interview between Alex Kantrowitz, Adel El Hallak from NVIDIA, and Joe Davis from ServiceNow discussing best practices for building AI agents. The conversation covers agent safety, governance, and a case study of ServiceNow's L1-AI-IT specialist automating 90% of internal support tickets.
